name: Gaia
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Gaia thick green syllable — the planet saying I am.
flowText: Gaia thick green syllable — the planet saying I am.

related.name: Onyx
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: Jasper
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: Page of Pentacles
related.teaser: Page of Pentacles is the coin of earth — Beginner’s mind; bring news and curiosity.

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.

related.name: ♉ Taurus
related.teaser: Taurus is the fertile ground — patient bull, body of Earth, keeper of roots.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Ten of Pentacles
related.teaser: Ten of Pentacles is the coin of earth — Completion and consequence; passing the mantle.

related.name: Three of Pentacles
related.teaser: Three of Pentacles is the coin of earth — Creation takes shape; teamwork with the element.

related.name: Fire Agate
